claims.subject: John
claims.object: professional basketball player, shooting guard for Minnesota Wolves
claims.retrieval_text: John is a professional basketball player, shooting guard for the Minnesota Wolves. He signed with the team in May 2023 and has been playing professionally for just under a year by December 2023.

claims.subject: John
claims.object: improve shooting percentage
claims.retrieval_text: John's goal is to improve his shooting percentage and become a consistent performer on the court.

claims.subject: John
claims.object: started playing basketball at age ten in local league
claims.retrieval_text: John started basketball at age ten when his dad signed him up for a local league. He played through middle school, high school, earned a college scholarship, and was drafted professionally.

claims.subject: John
claims.object: watched NBA games with his dad as a child
claims.retrieval_text: John used to watch NBA games with his dad as a kid and dreamed of playing on big courts.

claims.subject: John
claims.object: scored 40 points in a game, his personal best
claims.retrieval_text: John scored 40 points in a game in July 2023, his highest ever score. The team won a tough game and celebrated at a restaurant afterward.

claims.retrieval_text: John signed an endorsement deal with Nike for basketball shoes and gear. He was also in talks with Gatorade about a potential sponsorship.

claims.retrieval_text: John is in talks with Gatorade about a potential sponsorship deal.

claims.retrieval_text: John has met LeBron James a few times and seen him play live. He described LeBron as real chill.

claims.retrieval_text: John's favorite basketball team is the Minnesota Wolves, his own team.

claims.retrieval_text: John's number one goal is winning a basketball championship.

claims.object: charity work and inspiring youth through sports
claims.retrieval_text: John wants to make a difference through charity work and inspiring youth. He partners with organizations helping disadvantaged kids with sports and education, organized a basketball camp in his hometown, and held a benefit basketball game.

claims.retrieval_text: John organized a basketball camp for kids in his hometown last summer. He described seeing their faces light up on the court as priceless.

claims.retrieval_text: John organized a benefit basketball game that raised money for charity.

claims.retrieval_text: John hit a buzzer-beater shot to win a game after his team was down 10 points in the fourth quarter. He describes it as his favorite game.

claims.retrieval_text: John suffered a basketball injury requiring physical therapy. He was frustrated missing games but stayed positive. He reached a milestone of jogging pain-free and celebrated recovery with family.

claims.retrieval_text: John hurt his ankle last season which required time off and physical therapy.

claims.retrieval_text: John loves cooking as a creative outlet and therapy. He made a soup with sage and enjoys making honey garlic chicken with roasted vegetables.

claims.retrieval_text: John found a new gym to train for basketball. He created a workout plan combining basketball drills with strength training.

claims.retrieval_text: Tim is a passionate Harry Potter fan. HP is his favorite book. He collects memorabilia, decorated a Christmas tree with HP theme, attended an HP conference in the UK, went to HP-themed events and parties, and has MinaLima art from the films.

He wants to visit the Cliffs of Moher with amazing ocean views. John held a benefit basketball game that successfully raised money for charity. Tim is currently reading The Name of the Wind by Patrick Rothfuss.

segments.literal_summary: John signed an endorsement deal with a popular beverage company. Tim is researching visa requirements for his travel plans. John recommends Barcelona for its culture, architecture, food, and beaches.
segments.retrieval_text: John signed an endorsement deal with a popular beverage company, feeling like all the hard work paid off. Tim is researching visa requirements for countries he wants to visit and is proud of taking initiative toward his travel dreams. John recommends Barcelona for its culture, architecture, amazing food, and nearby beaches.
